name: PHQ-9 Depression Screening Codes
description: CPT and HCPCS codes for PHQ-9 (Patient Health Questionnaire-9) depression screening including brief emotional/behavioral assessment, annual depression screening, PHQ-9 specific quality codes, and health risk assessment instruments. Used in depression screening and follow-up quality measures (DSF).
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Brief emotional/behavioral assessment (e.g., depression inventory, attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder scale), with scoring and documentation, per standardized instrument

Screening for clinical depression is documented as being performed using an age-appropriate standardized depression screening tool AND if positive, a follow-up plan is documented on the date of the positive screen
Screening for clinical depression using an age-appropriate standardized tool is documented as positive AND a follow-up plan is documented
Screening for clinical depression using an age-appropriate standardized tool is documented as negative, a follow-up plan is not required
Administration of patient-focused health risk assessment instrument (e.g., health hazard appraisal) with scoring and documentation, per standardized instrument
Administration of caregiver-focused health risk assessment instrument for the benefit of the patient, with scoring and documentation, per standardized instrument
Administration and interpretation of health risk assessment instrument (e.g., health hazard appraisal)
